title: Searching in WorkForm Submissions Viewer
excerpt:
Is there a way to search for specific form submissions in the Viewer? There used to be the search and filter function in the old version of the viewer but I can’t find it in the new one.

posts.author: leideguzman (Lei De Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to search for specific form submissions in the Viewer? There used to be the search and filter function in the old version of the viewer but I can’t find it in the new one.

Also, I’ve set up an automation in the form where each submissions would be assigned an Item ID. Is there a way to make the Item ID show up on the new version of the Form Submissions Viewer?

Ultimately, I’m looking for the functionality wherein I can search for a specific submission in the new Viewer using the assigned Item ID. This used to be possible in the old viewer.

Thanks!
